title: eragrostis abortiva
intro: Eragrostis abortiva, also known as foxtail barley, is a type of grass native to North America that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis abortiva include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating coughs and colds. Eragrostis abortiva can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
